title: CNR SMILES to mechanical properties workflow - molecular scale
description: (Integrated workflow) - An integrated workflow based on atomistic molecular dynamics simulations that uses the SMILES representation of a monomer as input to automatically generate a polymer chain, construct a periodic bulk model, and perform fully atomistic simulations of mechanical properties. From the stress-strain response obtained under controlled deformation, the tool computes the key mechanical properties of the polymer, including Young’s modulus, bulk modulus, and Poisson’s ratio.
creator: https://ror.org/04zaypm56
